title: UI8Kit Codegen
subtitle: One typed render contract — seven generated runtimes with identical DOM, design, and ARIA.

features.title: Spec-driven
features.description: Brick definitions in a tiny expression IR — no hand-written drift across stacks.

features.title: Seven runtimes
features.description: Go Templ, React 19, Svelte 5, Vue 3, Latte, Twig, and static HTML from the same source.

features.title: DOM parity
features.description: The canonical renderer is the executable specification, verified by tests.
